race.comment: SPEED OF THOUGHT (9) back from a lengthy break and assess on the good on-pace second four starts back at Albury in the soft (7) going. Can make her presence felt with the senior rider aboard. METRO GIRL (6) blinkers come off after she went fast early with a fading seventh over 1100m at Wodonga on the heavy surface. Key jockey change and she finds an easier contest fourth-up. MOUNT OGILVIE (2) sound return when he surged late from back in the field to run fourth over 1000m at Narrandera. Strips fitter and look for him late. TENACIOUS TIGER (10) finished ninth last start over 900m at Albury when she had to contend with an awkward barrier. Draws a better marble this time. Watch for market value.
